next_steps: Perform magnetic resonance venography and magnetic resonance imaging of the brain with contrast
Perform lumbar puncture with measurement of opening pressure and cerebrospinal fluid analysis
Obtain erythrocyte sedimentation rate and C-reactive protein levels
Immediate ophthalmologic evaluation for papilledema or ischemic optic neuropathy
Consult neurology for urgent neurovascular assessment
Reconsider recent medications for potential drug-induced intracranial pressure changes or vascular triggers
